pr.title: [PLTF-2870] Support KOTS-managed Jira DC service accounts
pr.body:
HUMAN:
Validated end to end on replicated-02 with Jira DC and the Jira shim: KOTS-managed service-account values, OAuth linking, automatic webhook setup with an admin PAT, connection-scoped webhook delivery, pause/resume without OAuth redirect, and app health after deploying the PR image.

Jira Data Center support has not launched to internal or external customers yet, so this is release-hardening before first customer exposure.

- [x] A human has tested these changes.

AGENT:

## Why

Jira Data Center service-account credentials need to be configurable from the OpenHands Enterprise Admin Console/KOTS for single-install OHE deployments, while still preserving SaaS and unmanaged workspace behavior.

## Summary

- Add Jira DC service-account env support via `JIRA_DC_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_EMAIL` and `JIRA_DC_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_PAT`.
- Prefer env-managed credentials at runtime while preserving per-workspace credentials for SaaS/non-managed installs.
- Stop serializing decrypted Jira DC PATs into V1 callback processors; resolve the effective token at callback time instead.
- Add connection-scoped Jira DC webhook URLs at `/integration/jira-dc/connections/{workspace_id}/events` and forward the connection id with automation events.
- Hide in-app service-account entry when OpenHands Enterprise/KOTS service-account values are configured, surface partial env config errors, and keep status-only pause/resume out of OAuth.
- Harden connection-scoped webhook validation by rejecting payloads whose Jira host does not match the configured connection.

## How to Test

- `uv run ruff check --config enterprise/dev_config/python/ruff.toml enterprise/integrations/jira_dc/jira_dc_manager.py enterprise/integrations/jira_dc/jira_dc_service_account.py enterprise/tests/unit/integrations/jira_dc/test_jira_dc_manager.py enterprise/tests/unit/integrations/jira_dc/test_jira_dc_service_account.py enterprise/server/routes/integration/jira_dc.py enterprise/tests/unit/server/routes/test_jira_dc_integration_routes.py openhands/app_server/integrations/jira_dc/config.py openhands/app_server/web_client/default_web_client_config_injector.py tests/unit/app_server/test_default_web_client_config_injector.py`
- `PYTHONPATH=enterprise:. uv run --with python-keycloak --with limits --with coredis pytest enterprise/tests/unit/integrations/jira_dc/test_jira_dc_service_account.py enterprise/tests/unit/integrations/jira_dc/test_jira_dc_v1_callback_processor.py enterprise/tests/unit/integrations/jira_dc/test_jira_dc_manager.py enterprise/tests/unit/integrations/jira_dc/test_jira_dc_view.py enterprise/tests/unit/server/routes/test_jira_dc_integration_routes.py`
- `uv run pytest tests/unit/app_server/test_default_web_client_config_injector.py`
- `npm run typecheck:staged` from `frontend/`
- `npm run check-translation-completeness` from `frontend/`
- R02 end-to-end validation: deployed the PR image to `https://app.replicated-02.aws.alona.platform-team.all-hands.dev` alongside the OpenHands-Cloud KOTS config PR, configured Jira DC against `https://jira.replicated-02.aws.alona.platform-team.all-hands.dev`, verified KOTS-managed service account fields, OAuth linking, admin-PAT webhook install/refresh path, connection-scoped webhook delivery, pause/resume without OAuth redirect, and app health.

## Breaking Change / Rollout Note

This removes the old global Jira DC webhook endpoint `/integration/jira-dc/events` in favor of connection-scoped URLs: `/integration/jira-dc/connections/{workspace_id}/events`.

This is intentional for the initial public release. Jira Data Center support has not been publicly launched and has no supported internal or external consumers yet, so there are no customer webhooks to migrate. Internal test installs should reinstall or refresh the Jira webhook after deploying this PR so Jira receives the connection-scoped URL.

## Notes

- Depends on OpenHands/OpenHands-Cloud#658 for the KOTS/Admin Console fields.
- Migration 114 adds nullable `org_id` to `jira_dc_workspaces` and backfills from `user.current_org_id` where possible.
- Follow-up UI polish is split into #14547 so this PR stays focused on the service-account and webhook release blocker.

---

To run this PR locally, use the following command:

GUI with Docker:
```
docker run -it --rm   -p 3000:3000   -v /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock   --add-host host.docker.internal:host-gateway   --name openhands-app-59df388   docker.openhands.dev/openhands/openhands:59df388
```

---
Linear: PLTF-2870

_AI-generated metadata update by OpenHands on behalf of ak684._
